parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: Choose what the transform is applied to.

parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: inputattrscope
parameters.label: Input Attribute (Scope)
parameters.description: Input attribute when mode is Transform Attribute, input attribute scope when mode is Transform Attribute

parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: weightattr
parameters.label: Weight Attribute
parameters.description: Specifies the scope of the attribute that stores weight values

parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations.

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Uniform Scale
parameters.description: Specifies a uniform scale factor in all axes.

parameters.name: invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the transform resulting from the Translate, Rotate and Scale parameters.

parameters.name: vlength
parameters.label: Vectors Maintain Length
parameters.description: Enable preserving the original vector length after applying transformations.

parameters.name: lookat
parameters.label: Look At
parameters.description: Allows you to orient your object by naming the object you would like it to Look At, or (Z axis) point to. Once you have designated this object to look at, it will continue to face that object, even if

parameters.name: forwarddir
parameters.label: Forward Direction
parameters.description: Determines the forward direction for look at transformation.

parameters.name: xformmatrixop
parameters.label: Xform Matrix/CHOP/DAT
parameters.description: Sets as transform using a 4x4 matrix directly.

parameters.name: multiplyorder
parameters.label: Multiply Order
parameters.description: Order of transform between the transform matrix and the transform resulting from the Translate Rotate Scale parameters.

parameters.name: outputattrscope
parameters.label: Output Attribute (Scope)
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: overrideautoattr
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: attrtype
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: attrnumcomps
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: alignxformorder
parameters.label: Align Transform Order
parameters.description: Whether the transform from the Transform page or the Align page is applied first.

parameters.name: alignopord
parameters.label: Align Operation Order
parameters.description: Set the order in which scale and transform is applied in the align transform.

parameters.name: aligntx
parameters.label: Align Translate X
parameters.description: Sets the center of the geometry in X for the align transform.

parameters.name: fromx
parameters.label: From Input
parameters.description: Determines which part of the input geometry to align to the Origin or Input as selected in Post Translate parameter above.

parameters.name: tox
parameters.label: To Reference
parameters.description: Determines where on the reference the input is aligned.

parameters.name: alignty
parameters.label: Align Translate Y
parameters.description: Sets the center of the geometry in Y for the align transform.

parameters.name: fromy
parameters.label: From Input
parameters.description: Determines which part of the input geometry to align to the Origin or Input as selected in Post Translate parameter above.

parameters.name: toy
parameters.label: To Reference
parameters.description: Determines where on the reference the input is aligned.

parameters.name: aligntz
parameters.label: Align Translate Z
parameters.description: Sets the center of the geometry in Z for the align transform.

parameters.name: fromz
parameters.label: From Input
parameters.description: Determines which part of the input geometry to align to the Origin or Input as selected in Post Translate parameter above.

parameters.name: toz
parameters.label: To Reference
parameters.description: Determines where on the reference the input is aligned.

parameters.name: alignscale
parameters.label: Align Scale
parameters.description: Sets the scale of the geometry for the align transform.

parameters.name: alignscalex
parameters.label: Align Scale X
parameters.description: If align scale is per axis, sets the X scale of the geometry for the align transform.

parameters.name: alignscaley
parameters.label: Align Scale Y
parameters.description: If align scale is per axis, sets the Y scale of the geometry for the align transform.

parameters.name: alignscalez
parameters.label: Align Scale Z
parameters.description: If align scale is per axis, sets the Z scale of the geometry for the align transform.

parameters.name: map
parameters.label: Mapping
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute-to-parameter mapping.

parameters.name: map0op
parameters.label: OP
parameters.description: Source OP for parameter mapping. The default of _in0 means the input .

parameters.name: map0element
parameters.label: Element
parameters.description: The attribute (or component of an attribute) that will be mapped to a parameter per-point.

parameters.name: map0parm
parameters.label: Parameter
parameters.description: Parameter on the current that will be mapped from the Element (the attribute).

parameters.name: map0combineop
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: Combine operation for attribute value with parameter value.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: attrdefaultval3
parameters.label: Attrdefaultval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
